index.html.quickAnswer: Dr. Jan Duffy is a Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices REALTOR® and buyer's representative for the Skye Summit Master Plan—a 505-acre Olympia Companies community coming Fall 2027. Join the interest list for early-access updates—(702) 930-8222.

faqs.q: Why choose Dr. Jan Duffy for Skye Summit?
faqs.a: Dr. Jan Duffy is the buyer's representative for the Skye Summit Master Plan—early-access updates, builder coordination, and new-construction buyer representation, with 15+ years of local experience.

faqs.q: What makes the Skye Summit Master Plan different?
faqs.a: The Skye Summit Master Plan is a 505-acre Olympia Companies community just beyond the 215 Beltway, with desert-conscious design, integrated parks, and trail systems—coming Fall 2027.

faqs.q: How do I get first-access Skye Summit Master Plan updates?
faqs.a: Contact Dr. Jan Duffy to join the early-interest list for KB Home Vertice (sales may open early 2027), Woodside Homes, floor plans, and pricing as the community opens Fall 2027.

faqs.q: What will Skye Summit Master Plan HOA fees cover?

faqs.q: Are short-term rentals allowed?

skye-summit-schools.quickAnswer: School assignments for Skye Summit Master Plan addresses will depend on street location within the 505-acre community. Confirm zoning with CCSD before you buy—call (702) 930-8222.

faqs.q: How do I find which schools serve a Skye Summit Master Plan address?
faqs.a: Use CCSD zoning tools with the exact street address once lot assignments are available, then tour schools in person when possible.

faqs.q: When will school assignments be confirmed?
faqs.a: Confirm assignments with CCSD as builder phases and street addresses are released for the Skye Summit Master Plan.

skye-summit-vs-summerlin.quickAnswer: The Skye Summit Master Plan is a new 505-acre Olympia Companies community coming Fall 2027; Summerlin is a larger established west-side master plan. Compare lifestyle and timing with Dr. Jan Duffy as your Skye Summit Master Plan buyer's representative.

faqs.q: Is Skye Summit part of Summerlin?
faqs.a: No. The Skye Summit Master Plan is a separate Olympia Companies community in northwest Las Vegas, coming Fall 2027.
